content:
- Entered TO BE VERIFIED state for task-typed-dcs-writes-and-encapsulation and performed a deep skeptical pass with broad parallel probes across DCS/HA/API/test modules.
- Updated the task plan with concrete changes (member-id-based `write_leader_lease`, explicit scope of raw DcsStore retention for API/e2e), then switched marker to NOW EXECUTE.
- Implemented typed HA writer surface in src/dcs/store.rs via new DcsHaWriter trait and blanket impl over DcsStore; added store-level unit tests for leader/switchover typed paths.
- Switched HA context store type to Box<dyn DcsHaWriter> in src/ha/state.rs and refactored src/ha/worker.rs action dispatch to typed calls (`write_leader_lease`, `delete_leader`, `clear_switchover`) while keeping path helpers only for error reporting.
- Ran required gates with evidence capture: make check pass; make test initially failed with known cargo archive/object artifact race, recovered via cargo clean and rerun pass; make test-bdd pass; make lint pass.
- Captured required grep evidence for make test/lint markers (`congratulations` and `evaluation failed`) with explicit NOT_FOUND statuses.
- Updated task file checklist + status tags to done/true/true, ran .ralph/task_switch.sh, and added AGENTS.md learning about blanket trait adapters for scoped encapsulation refactors.
- Next: commit all modified files with required `task finished ...` message format and quit.

- Completed commit c828752 for task-typed-dcs-writes-and-encapsulation after running task_switch and updating task metadata/checklists.
- Final gate status: make check/test/test-bdd/lint all pass; make test needed one recovery cycle (`cargo clean`) after archive/object stale-artifact failure.
- Worktree is clean post-commit; task closure steps are complete.

- Loaded prior progress with .ralph/progress_read.sh (no existing entries returned).
- Parsed .ralph/current_tasks.md fully under bug-first and meta-task rules. Verified all bug tasks are already passing=true.
- Found remaining failing non-bug tasks: 16 (low), 19, 20, 21. Reviewed source task files to resolve ordering and dependency intent.
- Selected .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/19-task-do-meta-deep-skeptical-review-pass-1.md as the next logical task: it is the first failing item in the ordered meta-pass chain, while task 16 is explicitly low-priority/last.
- Wrote chosen task path into .ralph/current_task.txt and stopped further work per instruction.
- Next time: execute task 19 flow, which runs recurring meta-task 18 as a fresh pass and records findings/tasks.

- Read startup memory via .ralph/progress_read.sh and loaded active task pointer from .ralph/current_task.txt.
- Opened .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/19-task-do-meta-deep-skeptical-review-pass-1.md and confirmed it was in initial not_started state with no lifecycle marker.
- Per user workflow, ran parallel exploration across task 18/19/20/21, current task summaries, lifecycle-marker examples, and model state to build a concrete plan.
- Wrote a full Draft 1 execution plan into task 19, including preflight model gate, fresh-run evidence/logging strategy, deep skeptical audit tracks, fanout rules (add-bug/add-task-as-agent), mandatory gate runs, and closeout controls.
- Added terminal marker `TO BE VERIFIED` at end of task 19 and stopped before execution phase.
- Next run should detect TO BE VERIFIED, perform deep skeptical verification, alter at least one plan element, and then promote marker to NOW EXECUTE.

- Picked up task 19 from .ralph/current_task.txt, read task state, and found lifecycle marker TO BE VERIFIED.
- Ran a deep skeptical verification pass using broad parallel probes across task 18/19/20/21, model state, module inventory, and policy references.
- Altered the execution plan in task 19 (changed gate order to user-required check/test/test-bdd/lint and added a post-gate git-status control), then promoted marker to NOW EXECUTE.
- Began execution phase and enforced meta-task 18 preflight model gate: model was normal_high, so I recorded the mismatch in task 18 exploration notes, set .ralph/model.txt to deep_review, and halted before audit/gates as required.
- Next run should continue task 19 in NOW EXECUTE state with model already deep_review, perform full skeptical audit + fanout, run all four mandatory gates, then close out task 19.

- Read .ralph/current_task.txt -> .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/19-task-do-meta-deep-skeptical-review-pass-1.md (NOW EXECUTE).
- Verified preflight model gate: .ralph/model.txt already deep_review; proceeded with full meta-task 18 fresh run.
- Bootstrapped evidence dir .ralph/evidence/meta-18-pass1-20260303T020551Z and captured baseline + git status.
- Performed skeptical sweep (rg for unwrap/expect/panic/todo/etc, checked config deny_unknown_fields, reviewed etcd store watch bootstrap + reconnect logic, reviewed HA e2e fixture port reservation discipline, skimmed BDD tests).
- Ran and logged gates sequentially with pipefail + CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1: make check, make test, make test-bdd, make lint; also ran make test-real with PGTUSKMASTER_REQUIRE_REAL_BINARIES=1.
- Updated meta-task 18 exploration entry with audited modules + findings summary + gate outcomes; reset .ralph/model.txt back to normal_high.
- Marked task 19 acceptance complete and set <passing>true</passing>.
- Next: run .ralph/task_switch.sh, git add -A, commit with required message, ensure AGENTS.md updated if any new learnings, then switch off task.
